title: Pot Alert
description: Displays a red border around your screen when you are low on health.
body:
# PotAlert
A simple mod that displays a red border around your screen when you are low on health.

## Usage
`/potalert [1-9]` • Sets the number of hearts at which you will be alerted  
`/potalert disable` • Disables the alert

## Showcases
1.7.10: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=izEg-1OIBmw  
1.8.9: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nYaTsqEGxa8
